zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Kynaston於1466年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍德利時，她的父親Sir Roger Kynaston33歲，母親Elizabeth Grey27歲。她於1481年與Roger Thorne在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年在英國威爾斯梅利奧爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Kynaston was born in 1466, in Hordley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger Kynaston, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 27. She married Roger Thorne in 1481, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1535, in Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

Elle a épousé Roger Thorne en 1481, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Kynaston(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 호르들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Kynaston(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Roger Thorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Kynaston родилась в 1466 г. в местности хаурдли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Kynaston было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Thorne в 1481 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
